mapper.select: /* ConcertMapper.selectConcertInfosByMonth 월별 콘서트 정보 조회 */ SELECT A.CONCERT_NO , A.ARTIST_NM_KOR , A.ARTIST_NM_FOR , A.CONCERT_YEAR , A.CONCERT_MONTH , A.CONCERT_DATE , A.CONCERT_TIME , A.VENUE , A.TCT_SITE , A.TCT_OPEN_AT , A.POP_SCORE , A.ARTIST_NM_FOR , A.SEND_YN FROM TB_CONCERT_INFO AS A WHERE A.CONCERT_YEAR = #{year} AND A.CONCERT_MONTH = #{month} AND (A.CONCERT_DATE IS NULL OR A.CONCERT_DATE <> '0') GROUP BY A.CONCERT_YEAR , A.CONCERT_MONTH , A.CONCERT_DATE , A.VENUE ORDER BY A.CONCERT_DATE, A.POP_SCORE DESC
